title: Hancornia laxa
taxonomy: Hancornia laxa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Within the Apocynaceae family, Hancornia laxa is a member of the subfamily Rauvolfioideae. The classification also places it in the genus Hancornia, which contains a few species of tropical plants. Hancornia laxa is also known as the "cupuacu" due to its fruit's similarity to the cupuacu tree, another plant in the same family.
